mapper.select: select left(dong_code, 2) as code, sido_name, null as gugun_name, null as dong_name from dongcodes group by left(dong_code, 2), sido_name order by code

select left(dong_code, 5) as code, sido_name, gugun_name, null as dong_name from dongcodes where left(dong_code, 2) = #{sidoCode} and gugun_name is not null and gugun_name != '' group by left(dong_code, 5), sido_name, gugun_name order by code
select dong_code as code, sido_name, gugun_name, dong_name from dongcodes where left(dong_code, 5) = #{sigunguCode} order by dong_code
